categories.name: Software development
categories.description: Skills covering the build phases of the software development lifecycle, from analysis and coding through release.

subcategories.name: Analysis & requirements
subcategories.description: Skills for turning intent into requirements, acceptance criteria, user stories, and grounded architecture diagrams before any code is written.

subcategories.name: Coding, refactoring & delivery
subcategories.description: Skills that help write new code, audit and refactor existing structures, manage defects, and keep the stack modern.

subcategories.name: Release & operations
subcategories.description: Skills for preparing releases, changelogs, version bumps, and post-release CI follow-through.

subcategories.name: Project management
subcategories.description: Skills for planning project work, bootstrapping repositories, defining project governance, and translating approved plans into implementation tasks.

subcategories.name: SDLC
subcategories.description: Skills that orchestrate or support the software development lifecycle end-to-end.

categories.name: Quality & testing
categories.description: Skills covering the full quality lifecycle: test analysis and design, automation frameworks, specialized testing disciplines, test data, and contract or design fidelity.

subcategories.name: Test design & review
subcategories.description: Skills for analyzing requirements for testability, designing test cases with the right black-box technique, and reviewing drafted or automated tests for quality and coverage.

subcategories.name: Test management & planning
subcategories.description: Skills for planning test efforts, defining test strategy, and organizing test management activities.

subcategories.name: Test automation frameworks
subcategories.description: Skills for authoring and operating test automation in specific frameworks (Cypress, Playwright, JUnit 5, Rest Assured) plus stack-aware unit and component tests.

subcategories.name: Specialized testing
subcategories.description: Skills for testing concerns that cut across features: performance, responsive behavior, accessibility, and security.

subcategories.name: Test data
subcategories.description: Skills for generating realistic, seeded, and distribution-shaped synthetic data for tests, demos, and sandboxes.

subcategories.name: Design fidelity & contracts
subcategories.description: Skills that catch drift between an implementation and its source of truth — design systems, API contracts, schemas.

categories.name: Agent platform
categories.description: Skills that support the agent runtime itself: context and memory, orchestration, prompt and telemetry quality, and skill maintenance.

subcategories.name: Context & memory
subcategories.description: Skills that build, prune, persist, and clean up the information layer an agent reasons over.

subcategories.name: Orchestration & dispatch
subcategories.description: Skills that route work to the right skill and execute multi-phase agent chains end-to-end.

subcategories.name: Prompt & telemetry
subcategories.description: Skills that score prompts for clarity and structure, and produce auditable token-usage and cost reports from runtime evidence.

subcategories.name: Skill maintenance
subcategories.description: Skills that maintain other skills — frontmatter hygiene, metadata cleanup, YAML optimization.

categories.name: Governance & compliance
categories.description: Skills that design human-oversight controls, handoff contracts, and review flows aligned with regulatory regimes such as the EU AI Act.

subcategories.name: Oversight & HITL
subcategories.description: Skills for human-in-the-loop oversight, handoff design, and regulatory-aligned review flows.

categories.name: Agile facilitation
categories.description: Skills supporting agile ceremonies, retrospectives, and team facilitation artifacts.

subcategories.name: Ceremonies & retrospectives
subcategories.description: Skills for designing retrospective boards, capturing outcomes, and turning them into action items and tracker-ready output.

categories.name: Architecture
categories.description: Skills focused on software architecture, system design, and architectural decision-making.

subcategories.name: Architecture
subcategories.description: Skills for designing, reviewing, and documenting software architecture.

categories.name: Smart Home
categories.description: Skills for smart home integration, devices, and home automation.

subcategories.name: Home automation
subcategories.description: Skills related to home automation, device control, and smart integrations.

defaultCategoryDescription: Other assorted skills that don't fit into a specific predefined category.
